productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Plugged IN Blue Flip Flops
description: adidas created this Plugged In 2 flip flops for all techies. The print features circuitry on its footbed. Pair them with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims. Upper Thick fabric striped thong straps Fabric toe separator for maximum comfort with branding on the axis of the Flip Flops Rubber footbed with print for all-day massage feel Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
